packageRules.description: uPortal runs JSR-286 (Portlet API 2.0). Portlet API 3.x (JSR-362) is a different container contract and is not supported.
Pinned to Spring Framework 4.3.x / Spring Security 4.2.x. Spring 5+ requires a coordinated migration; Spring 6+ additionally needs Jakarta EE + Java 17+.
Pinned to Hibernate 5.6.x. Hibernate 6+ (including the org.hibernate.orm groupId rename) requires Jakarta EE and Java 17+.
The 2.x releases preserve the javax.xml.bind.* package namespace. 3+ moves to jakarta.xml.bind as part of Jakarta EE 9+, which this portlet is not migrating to yet.
plexus-archiver 4.10+ requires a newer commons-io (BoundedInputStream.builder()) than the one bundled with maven-war-plugin 3.4.0. Revisit once the fleet's parent bumps maven-war-plugin to 3.5.x+.

Mockito 5 uses the inline MockMaker by default; its bundled byte-buddy references ClassFileVersion.JAVA_V21, missing on the byte-buddy pulled transitively via Hibernate/Javassist. Stay on Mockito 4.x until byte-buddy can be reconciled.
Servlet API 5+ is in the Jakarta EE namespace and incompatible with this portlet's javax.servlet imports. Runtime is Tomcat 8.5/9 (Servlet 3.1).
Gradle 9 requires Java 17; this portlet builds on the fleet's Java 11 floor. Revisit when the fleet moves to Java 17 (gated on the Spring 6 / Jakarta EE migration).
json-path 3.x raised its build-time floor to Java 17 and only publishes Java 17+ class-file variants. This portlet builds on the fleet's Java 11 floor. Revisit when the fleet moves to Java 17.
